## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR do and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Related issues

<!-- "Closes #123" or "Refs #456" -->

## Testing

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes locally
- [ ] Added/updated tests for new behaviour
- [ ] `saga doctor` still reports healthy after changes (if relevant)

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added (if user-facing change — auto-handled if Conventional Commits used)
- [ ] Topic notes / `docs/` updated (if architectural change)

## Reviewer checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commits used in commit messages
- [ ] No secrets, personal paths, or internal references in diff
- [ ] No breaking change without explicit version bump

## Notes for reviewer

<!-- Anything specific you'd like the reviewer to focus on? -->
